title: Quercetin After 40: What This Powerful Flavonoid Does for Your Immune System
tags: quercetin, immunity, flavonoids, anti-inflammatory, women over 40, allergy, antioxidant
summary: Quercetin is a clinically studied flavonoid that stabilizes mast cells, reduces inflammatory cytokines, and supports immune resilience in women over 40, with bioavailable liposomal and phytosome formulations showing significantly greater effectiveness than standard capsule forms.
featured_image_alt: Colorful quercetin-rich fruits and vegetables including apples, berries, and leafy greens for immune health
